single_card.name: Single Card
single_card.description: A simple one-card draw for quick insight or daily guidance

positions.name: The Message
positions.meaning: The main insight, guidance, or energy for your question

three_card.name: Three Card Spread
three_card.description: A versatile three-card spread that can represent past/present/future, situation/action/outcome, or mind/body/spirit

positions.name: Past/Situation
positions.meaning: What has led to this situation or the foundation of the matter

positions.name: Present/Action
positions.meaning: The current state or what action should be taken

positions.name: Future/Outcome
positions.meaning: The likely outcome or future development

celtic_cross.name: Celtic Cross
celtic_cross.description: The most famous tarot spread, providing comprehensive insight into a situation with 10 cards

positions.name: Present Situation
positions.meaning: The heart of the matter, your current situation or state of mind

positions.name: Challenge/Cross
positions.meaning: The challenge you face or what crosses you in this situation

positions.name: Distant Past/Foundation
positions.meaning: The foundation of the situation, distant past influences

positions.name: Recent Past
positions.meaning: Recent events or influences that are now passing away

positions.name: Possible Outcome
positions.meaning: One possible outcome if things continue as they are

positions.name: Near Future
positions.meaning: What is approaching in the immediate future

positions.name: Your Approach
positions.meaning: Your approach to the situation, how you see yourself

positions.name: External Influences
positions.meaning: How others see you or external influences affecting the situation

positions.name: Hopes and Fears
positions.meaning: Your inner feelings, hopes, and fears about the situation

positions.name: Final Outcome
positions.meaning: The final outcome, the culmination of all influences

relationship_cross.name: Relationship Cross
relationship_cross.description: A 7-card spread specifically designed for examining relationships, whether romantic, friendship, or family

positions.name: You
positions.meaning: Your role, feelings, and contribution to the relationship

positions.name: Your Partner
positions.meaning: Their role, feelings, and contribution to the relationship

positions.name: The Relationship
positions.meaning: The current state and dynamic of the relationship itself

positions.name: What Unites You
positions.meaning: Common ground, shared values, and what brings you together

positions.name: What Divides You
positions.meaning: Differences, conflicts, and what creates tension

positions.name: Advice
positions.meaning: Guidance for improving and nurturing the relationship

positions.name: Future Potential
positions.meaning: Where the relationship is heading and its potential outcome
